headline: NVIDIA Brev product engineer helping developers get faster access to GPU infrastructure
title: Dev Tech Engineer
confidenceNote: Public sources consistently connect Tyler Fong to NVIDIA/Brev and GPU developer infrastructure work; the exact Dev Tech Engineer title is from the attendee row rather than a public profile.
bioMarkdown: Dev tech engineer at NVIDIA working around Brev and GPU developer infrastructure. Useful contact for developers building AI workloads that need smoother GPU access and cloud setup.

primary.note: Public profile says Tyler Fong works on enterprise product at NVIDIA and Brev.

headline: DigitalOcean AI infrastructure engineer building model routing and inference products
title: Senior Software Engineer II
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, DigitalOcean's company blog, and a public AI Engineer World's Fair speaker post consistently identify Tyler Gillam as a DigitalOcean Senior Software Engineer II working on AI inference routing.
bioMarkdown: Senior Software Engineer II at DigitalOcean working on agentic AI infrastructure and inference routing. He helps teams choose models by cost, latency, task type, and product constraints.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies Tyler Gillam as Senior Software Engineer II for Agentic AI at DigitalOcean.

primary.label: LinkedIn speaker post
primary.note: Public post says he is speaking at AI Engineer World's Fair about model routing work at DigitalOcean.

secondary.note: DigitalOcean says Tyler Gillam helped build and demo the Inference Router, its AI routing product.

secondary.label: LinkedIn directory result
secondary.note: Public directory result repeats Senior Software Engineer II at DigitalOcean in Austin.
